name: 6-Day Tour: Fes → Merzouga → Ait Ben Haddou → Marrakech (complete tour)

seo.title: 6-Day Fes to Marrakech Tour — Sahara, Khamlia, Todra, Skoura, Ait Ben Haddou | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: The most complete tour from Fes to Marrakech in 6 days: Ifrane, Azrou, Ziz, Merzouga (Khamlia Gnawa), Rissani souk, Todra, Dades, Valley of Roses, Skoura, Ait Ben Haddou, Ouarzazate.

hero.tagline: The most complete: Fes → Merzouga → Marrakech in 6 days

intro: This 6-day tour is the richest itinerary from Fes to Marrakech. It includes all the must-see stops of southern Morocco: the Azrou cedar forest, the Ziz Valley, the Merzouga desert with a 4x4 excursion to nomadic families and the Gnawa music of Khamlia, the Rissani souk, the Todra Gorges, the Dades Valley, the Valley of Roses, the Skoura oasis, the Ouarzazate film studios and the ksar of Ait Ben Haddou.
